assessment.note: Mentoring request has been stalled for three months without pushback — strong engagement-stagnation signal.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Personal growth
new_queue.name: Where do you see the biggest gap between where you are now and where you want to be in 12 months?
new_queue.description: Encourages Priya to think about her development and growth trajectory.

new_queue.label: Mentoring block
new_queue.name: What's blocked the mentoring from happening — your time, opportunity, or something else?
new_queue.description: Explores the reasons behind the stalled mentoring opportunity.

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What support would you need to feel ready for upcoming projects?
new_queue.description: Identifies resources or assistance Priya might require for future responsibilities.
